about.title: About MIS
about.subtitle: Discover the visionaries and the mission behind Bangladesh's national health data digitisation.
about.mission_text: To digitise Bangladesh's healthcare landscape by implementing robust, real-time management information systems that empower policy makers with actionable data.
about.vision_text: A transformation into a data-driven health ecosystem where every citizen's health information is secure, accessible, and utilized for better health outcomes.
about.team_subtitle: Meet the dedicated professionals leading the digital health revolution at DGHS MIS.
about.compliance_desc: Aligned with international digital health standards and national cybersecurity protocols.
about.ecosystem_desc: Integrating clinical databases with national health identification stream services.
about.governance_desc: Real-time health statistics visualization for institutional oversight and policy modeling.

links.title: Ecosystem Analytics
links.subtitle: Quantitative oversight of health information systems and the digital transformation landscape of Bangladesh.
links.governance_desc: Our analytics are derived directly from the national health information exchange protocols, ensuring 100% data integrity and sovereign oversight.
links.uptime_commitment: Our systems are architected for 99.9% uptime, ensuring national health data is processed and visualized with absolute integrity.
links.useful_links_subtitle: Access key health information systems, dashboards, and national health portals.
links.secure_access_desc: All external links connect to verified government systems with secure authentication protocols.
